scripts.start:dev: node scripts/with-env.js development -- npx expo start --dev-client
scripts.start:preview: node scripts/with-env.js preview -- npx expo start --dev-client
scripts.start:prod: node scripts/with-env.js production -- npx expo start --dev-client
scripts.android:dev: node scripts/with-env.js development -- npx expo run:android
scripts.android:preview: node scripts/with-env.js preview -- npx expo run:android --variant release
scripts.android:prod: node scripts/with-env.js production -- npx expo run:android --variant release
scripts.ios:dev: node scripts/with-env.js development -- npx expo run:ios
scripts.ios:preview: node scripts/with-env.js preview -- npx expo run:ios --configuration Release
scripts.ios:prod: node scripts/with-env.js production -- npx expo run:ios --configuration Release
scripts.config:dev: node scripts/with-env.js development -- npx expo config
scripts.config:preview: node scripts/with-env.js preview -- npx expo config
scripts.config:prod: node scripts/with-env.js production -- npx expo config
scripts.prebuild:dev: node scripts/with-env.js development -- npx expo prebuild --clean
scripts.prebuild:preview: node scripts/with-env.js preview -- npx expo prebuild --clean
scripts.prebuild:prod: node scripts/with-env.js production -- npx expo prebuild --clean
scripts.build:android:dev: node scripts/with-env.js development -- eas build --platform android --profile development
scripts.build:android:preview: node scripts/with-env.js preview -- eas build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.build:android:prod: node scripts/with-env.js production -- eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.build:ios:dev: node scripts/with-env.js development -- eas build --platform ios --profile development
scripts.build:ios:preview: node scripts/with-env.js preview -- eas build --platform ios --profile preview
scripts.build:ios:prod: node scripts/with-env.js production -- eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.build:dev: node scripts/with-env.js development -- eas build --profile development
scripts.build:preview: node scripts/with-env.js preview -- eas build --profile preview
scripts.build:prod: node scripts/with-env.js production -- eas build --profile production
